fonds.institution: Whyte Museum of the Canadian Rockies
fonds.scope: Family photographs, guide logbooks, correspondence, field notes, 1881–ca.1976
fonds.findings: Gottfried Feuz (1872–1949) is documented in the Edward Feuz fonds, likely as a collaborating guide or family member. 327 total records in fonds; 4 records specifically match '1906 yoho feuz' search. Fonds covers the period 1881–ca.1976, spanning Gottfried's entire guiding career (if employed by CPR from 1899).
fonds.notes: Fonds does not distinguish separately between Édouard Sr. and Gottfried, so they are co-documented under M93/V200. Additional research needed to extract Gottfried-specific materials.

fonds.institution: Alpine Club of Canada Library & Archives (housed at Whyte Museum)
fonds.scope: Camp records, guide lists, expedition reports, photographs, 1906–present
fonds.findings: ACC camp records for 1906 Yoho Pass camp likely list Gottfried Feuz by name as a guide assigned to specific climbs. 4 records match '1906 yoho feuz' across multiple fonds, including ACC.
fonds.notes: ACC records are critical for verifying Gottfried's official role and assignments at the July 1906 camp.

Birth records for Gottfried Feuz (1872), family documents, potential correspondence with Canada. May clarify relationship to Édouard Sr. (1859) and help reconstruct family genealogy.
